resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word.isupper() or word.islower() or (word[0].isupper() and word[1:].islower())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution checks for three conditions: all uppercase, all lowercase, or the first letter uppercase and the rest lowercase, utilizing built-in string methods for efficient checking.
